isIn: {property} must be one of the following values: {constraints.0}
isEnum: {property} must be one of the following values: {constraints.1}
minLength: {property} must be longer than or equal to {constraints.0} characters
maxLength: {property} must be shorter than or equal to {constraints.0} characters
nonNegativeIntegerString: {property} must be a non-negative integer string
isHostnameOrWildcard: Each entry must be a valid hostname or wildcard (e.g. "example.com" or "*.example.com")
isCidr: Each entry must be a valid CIDR (e.g. "10.0.0.0/8" or "fc00::/7"). Single IPs require explicit prefix (e.g. "10.0.0.5/32")
